'''mopavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccuplike|hiccuplike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccuplike|hiccuplike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mopavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mopavithi|mopavithi]] || [[word:mopaviji|mopaviji]] || [[word:mopavishi|mopavishi]] || [[word:mopaviki|mopaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mopavuthuthu|mopavuthuthu]] || [[word:mopavujuju|mopavujuju]] || [[word:mopavushushu|mopavushushu]] || [[word:mopavukuku|mopavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mopavuthu|mopavuthu]] || [[word:mopavuju|mopavuju]] || [[word:mopavushu|mopavushu]] || [[word:mopavuku|mopavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mopavufthuf|mopavufthuf]] || [[word:mopavufjuf|mopavufjuf]] || [[word:mopavufshuf|mopavufshuf]] || [[word:mopavufkuf|mopavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mopavethe|mopavethe]] || [[word:mopaveje|mopaveje]] || [[word:mopaveshe|mopaveshe]] || [[word:mopaveke|mopaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mopavothotho|mopavothotho]] || [[word:mopavojojo|mopavojojo]] || [[word:mopavoshosho|mopavoshosho]] || [[word:mopavokoko|mopavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mopavotho|mopavotho]] || [[word:mopavojo|mopavojo]] || [[word:mopavosho|mopavosho]] || [[word:mopavoko|mopavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mopavofthof|mopavofthof]] || [[word:mopavofjof|mopavofjof]] || [[word:mopavofshof|mopavofshof]] || [[word:mopavofkof|mopavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfthÃŸf|mopavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfjÃŸf|mopavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfshÃŸf|mopavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfkÃŸf|mopavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mopavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mopavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mopavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mopavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfthÃŸf|mopavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfjÃŸf|mopavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfshÃŸf|mopavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfkÃŸf|mopavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfthÃŸf|mopavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfjÃŸf|mopavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfshÃŸf|mopavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mopavÃŸfkÃŸf|mopavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mopavÃḊthÃḊ|mopavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mopavÃḊjÃḊ|mopavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mopavÃḊshÃḊ|mopavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mopavÃḊkÃḊ|mopavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mopavathatha|mopavathatha]] || [[word:mopavajaja|mopavajaja]] || [[word:mopavashasha|mopavashasha]] || [[word:mopavakaka|mopavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mopavatha|mopavatha]] || [[word:mopavaja|mopavaja]] || [[word:mopavasha|mopavasha]] || [[word:mopavaka|mopavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mopavafthaf|mopavafthaf]] || [[word:mopavafjaf|mopavafjaf]] || [[word:mopavafshaf|mopavafshaf]] || [[word:mopavafkaf|mopavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mopavasha|mopavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mopavshÃḋasha|mopavshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mopavroasha|mopavroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mopavmuasha|mopavmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mopavyaasha|mopavyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomopavnkshÃḋasha|gomopavnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomopavnkroasha|gomopavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomopavnkmuasha|gomopavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomopavnkyaasha|gomopavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mopapavasha|mopapavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mopapavshÃḋasha|mopapavshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mopapavroasha|mopapavroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mopapavmuasha|mopapavmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mopapavyaasha|mopapavyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomopapavnkshÃḋasha|gomopapavnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomopapavnkroasha|gomopapavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomopapavnkmuasha|gomopapavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomopapavnkyaasha|gomopapavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mepÃḊvasha|mepÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mepÃḊvshÃḋasha|mepÃḊvshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mepÃḊvroasha|mepÃḊvroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mepÃḊvmuasha|mepÃḊvmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mepÃḊvyaasha|mepÃḊvyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomepÃḊvnkshÃḋasha|gomepÃḊvnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomepÃḊvnkroasha|gomepÃḊvnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomepÃḊvnkmuasha|gomepÃḊvnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomepÃḊvnkyaasha|gomepÃḊvnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mopfavasha|mopfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mopfavshÃḋasha|mopfavshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mopfavroasha|mopfavroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mopfavmuasha|mopfavmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mopfavyaasha|mopfavyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomopfavnkshÃḋasha|gomopfavnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomopfavnkroasha|gomopfavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomopfavnkmuasha|gomopfavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomopfavnkyaasha|gomopfavnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
